name: Hillgrove Resources Limited
analysis: HGO's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 10% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$0.0520. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.0550, stop A$0.0445, target A$0.0610 (0.57:1) — then trail it.
